summary: Coder v3 closes all 4 of my v2 findings. The two new throw-coverage tests are mutation-confirmed honest — each fails when the exact production line it guards is deleted and passes otherwise (Mutation A: Promote throw; Mutation B: _foldLoaded primitive carve-out). The N1 grep-pin no longer passes vacuously, N2 now pins channel value-flow via %!data% echo, and baseline-tests.md is recorded. C# 3696/3696, PLang 253/253 (the 8 HTTP fails on first run were httpbin.org external transients — v3 touched zero production source — cleared on clean re-run). type/this.cs coverage rose 62.3->78.3% line / 33.3->57.1% branch, and the throw branch is verified not merely executed. PASS.
